name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkHeldBy(i, j) == forks[i] = j

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Actions *)
TakeFork(i, j) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![j] = i]
PutFork(i, j) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![j] = 0]
Think(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
Hungry(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
Eat(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       PhilosopherThinking(i) /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i)) /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i)) 
       /\ TakeFork(i, LEFT(i)) 
       /\ TakeFork(i, RIGHT(i)) 
       /\ Eat(i)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       PhilosopherEating(i) 
       /\ PutFork(i, LEFT(i)) 
       /\ PutFork(i, RIGHT(i)) 
       /\ Think(i)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
               /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
           /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, count>>

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, count>>

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \A j \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks'[j] = clocks[j] + offsets[j]
          /\ offsets'[j] = offsets[j] + (Avg - clocks[j])
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = Append(known, 1)
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, 1)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
       \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId

CONSTANTS Topics

Init == /\ subscribers \in [Topics -> SUBSET Nat]
        /\ messages \in [Topics -> Seq(Nat)]
        /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
        /\ nextSubId \in Nat

Next == /\ nextMsgId' \in Nat
        /\ nextSubId' \in Nat
        /\ subscribers' \in [Topics -> SUBSET Nat]
        /\ messages' \in [Topics -> Seq(Nat)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 0 THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 1 THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF wants[i] = 1 THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts


  (* --state Increment
  counts[n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1
  *)
  (* --state Merge
  counts[n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])
  *)
end
*)

(* --state Init
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --state Increment
counts[n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1
*)

(* --state Merge
counts[n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])
*)

(* --state GlobalCount
globalCount = Sum([n \in Node |-> Max({counts[n][m] : m \in Node})])
*)

(* --state TypeOK
TypeOK == /\ Node \subseteq Nat
        /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
        /\ globalCount \in Nat
*)

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == \/ /\ n \in Node
        /\ counts[n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1
      \/ /\ n \in Node
        /\ m \in Node
        /\ counts[n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====
